title: Linux Fundamentals
summary: FHS, permissions, processes, signals and file descriptors — the OS ground every tool stands on.

fights.title: Lay a correct FHS directory tree for a tool
Set octal permissions + a dedicated system user
Walk /proc/PID to print a process tree
Reproduce 2>&1 and here-doc redirection by hand

boss.title: Linux Trial
questions: Explain SIGTERM vs SIGKILL vs SIGHUP and when each is used.
What are file descriptors 0/1/2 and how does 2>&1 work at the OS level?
Given only a PID, how do you read its open files and parent process?
